message:
feat(conformance): add execute_* handlers for unistd family (bd-yehw)

Add conformance test executors for 14 unistd functions:
- getpid, getppid, getuid, getgid, geteuid, getegid
- getcwd, isatty, access, close, lseek, pipe
- read, write (dynamic fd cases skipped)

Enables conformance matrix generation for unistd_ops.json fixture.
Increases passed cases from 476 to 591 in verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
